_comment: External URLs the markdown link checker (scripts/docs/check-markdown-links.mjs) must not enforce. Every entry needs a non-trivial 'reason' so reviewers can audit drift. Patterns are JS regex source matched against the raw URL.

entries.reason: localhost URLs are documented for local dev (e.g. n8n at :5678 in ops/README.md) and are never reachable from CI runners.
Cited in docs/adr/0016-user-deletion-and-pii-handling.md as a 30-day-grace reference at the time of the decision; ADRs are immutable records — link rot since 2025 is expected.
Cited in docs/adr/0016-user-deletion-and-pii-handling.md; GitHub docs URL was valid at the time of the decision and is preserved as a historical reference.
Cited in docs/adr/0016-user-deletion-and-pii-handling.md; Linear restructured their docs path tree in 2025. Preserved as historical reference.

Cited as a SaaS conversion benchmark source in docs/launch/01-monetization-and-pricing.md; First Page Sage rotates report URLs per quarter, the citation pins the report+year (2021–2025) which is the auditable claim.
Cited as a mobile retention benchmark in docs/launch/01-monetization-and-pricing.md; the report+year is the auditable claim, not the live URL — host has had stability issues throughout 2026.
Product Hunt blocks HEAD/GET from non-browser user-agents and frequently returns 403/404 to checker tools even when the page renders fine in browsers.
CookieYes returns HTTP 415 to HEAD/GET requests but the page renders correctly in browsers; treated-as-ok status code already handles this, listed here as a belt-and-suspenders for documentation.
Adjust applies aggressive rate-limiting to ebook download URLs; treated-as-ok already covers 429 but listed here so PR reviewers see the explicit justification.

claude.ai gates project pages behind login and returns 403 to anonymous HEAD/GET; cited in docs/launch/05-operations-and-automation.md as a Claude Projects reference, the link is correct for authenticated users.

Cited in docs/adr/0042-password-hashing-strategy.md як референс на bcrypt 72-byte cap у Better Auth docs at time of decision (2026-05-03); ADRs immutable — better-auth restructured docs path tree. Auditable claim — версія/політика на момент ADR.

Цитується в docs/adr/0042-password-hashing-strategy.md як posv-cite на password-utils source (better-auth main branch). main-link rot — файл переіменовано/винесено у sub-package, але ADR прив'язаний до моменту прийняття.

Cited в docs/adr/0043-cloudsync-v1-sunset.md як industry-precedent на 6-фазний deprecation rollout (Apigee policy at time of decision, 2026-05-04). Google rotates Cloud docs URLs регулярно — auditable claim це стандарт-практика, не live URL.

Cited в docs/initiatives/0006-frontend-routing-and-code-split.md §6 як reference на ScrollRestoration component API at time of initiative draft. React Router restructured docs site (now /6.x/components/...). Pinned-by-version citation — claim audit-able, link rot expected.

Cited в docs/planning/stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-13-postgres-pool-sizing.md як reference на pg.Pool API at time of planning (2026-05). node-postgres docs site reorganized in 2025 — API surface unchanged, URL path moved to /apis/pool. Historical citation.

npm package pages return 403 to non-browser User-Agents (anti-scraping). Pages render correctly in browsers; cited у docs/testing/mutation.md та інших як package-reference. Treated-as-ok вже мав би покрити, але listed тут explicit для PR-reviewer audit.
